heading: Today
text: A mix of clouds and sun. More clouds from the Adirondacks and Rt. 4 north during the afternoon. Highs in the upper 70s to low 80s north, in the 80s in the Champlain Valley and south. Light, variable winds, becoming west to southwest near 10 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Periods of clouds south. Mostly cloudy from the Adirondacks and Rt. 4 north, with a chance of showers. Quite mild. Lows in the upper 50s to mid 60s. Winds becoming southwest 10 to 15 mph.

heading: Saturday
text: Mostly cloudy through NY, and Rt. 4 north, with showers or a thunderstorm becoming likely. Some sun south early, then a chance of afternoon showers or a thunderstorm. Highs in the 70s north, upper 70s to low 80s south. Winds varying from south to west near 10 mph, gusting to 20 mph from the south in the Champlain Valley.
